title: Parkio Daily for May 14, 2026
teaser: Swedish Chef snack stand opens at Hollywood Studios, Bluey virtual queue confirmed, and new Disney Springs retail tenant announced.

breaking.title: FØØD by Swedish Chef Snack Stand Opens at Hollywood Studios
breaking.body: A new Muppets-themed quick-service location debuts in the Rock 'n' Roller Coaster courtyard. The stand replaces an earlier kiosk and brings Swedish Chef's chaotic culinary style to the park's snack lineup.

parkioInsight.text: New snack locations typically draw curious crowds early. Swing by mid-afternoon or after 5pm when the initial rush tends to thin out, and lines usually stay shorter.

breaking.title: Bluey's Wild World to Use Virtual Queue at Animal Kingdom
breaking.body: Disney confirmed the new Bluey play experience launching at Conservation Station will require a virtual queue booking through My Disney Experience. The system returns to Walt Disney World for the first time in over a year to manage capacity for the small-footprint attraction.

parkioInsight.text: Virtual queue drops usually happen at 7am and 1pm. Setting an alarm and being ready to tap at drop time often gives you the best shot at securing a return window before slots fill.

bignews.title: Cole Haan Footwear Brand Heading to Disney Springs Town Center
bignews.body: The footwear and accessories brand posted a teaser video confirming a new Disney Springs location. The announcement comes as Town Center continues reshuffling its tenant mix following recent closures of Shore, Johnston & Murphy, and Francesca's.

parkioInsight.text: New Disney Springs retail openings usually offer launch-day promos or limited merchandise. Check social channels for opening dates and plan a visit in the first week if you're after exclusive items.

topstories.title: Mickey's Not-So-Scary Halloween Party Dates Announced for 2026
topstories.body: The annual Halloween ticketed event runs August 7 through October 31 at Magic Kingdom this year. Pricing varies by date, with peak nights commanding higher ticket costs than early-season weeknights.

parkioInsight.text: Peak dates near Halloween and weekend nights typically sell out weeks ahead and draw heavier crowds. Mid-week dates in early August or September often offer shorter lines and lower ticket prices.

topstories.title: New Loungefly Convertible Backpack Field-Tested Across Disney World
topstories.body: A Fantasia-themed Loungefly bag that converts from backpack to crossbody passed a full multi-day park test. The review highlights comfort, storage capacity, and versatility for guests juggling merchandise, snacks, and personal items.

parkioInsight.text: Convertible bags offer flexibility during long park days. Look for them at World of Disney or Disney Springs retail locations—stock on popular styles tends to move fast, especially near holidays.

topstories.title: Star Wars Galaxy's Edge Culinary Team Shares Menu Development Process
topstories.body: Disney Parks Blog profiled Chef Maria Colon Cabrera, who leads food storytelling at Galaxy's Edge in Hollywood Studios. The piece explores how dishes are designed to fit Batuu's world-building, from turmeric-infused pot roast to collaboration with Lucasfilm on naming and plating.

parkioInsight.text: Galaxy's Edge dining usually sees lighter crowds during dinner hours. Docking Bay 7 and Ronto Roasters often have shorter waits between 5–6pm before evening crowds build.

icymi.title: New Disney Athletic Dress Collection Launches Online
icymi.body: Her Universe released a line of Disney-themed athletic dresses featuring Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, and Disney Princess designs. The collection is available on shopDisney and follows the viral athletic dress trend.

icymi.title: Universal Orlando Hotel Rates Hit Multi-Year Lows for Summer
icymi.body: Discount pricing across Universal Orlando properties for summer 2026 represents some of the deepest room rate cuts seen in years, according to booking data. The pricing shift arrives ahead of Epic Universe's opening.

icymi.title: Disneyland Teases Patriotic Sam Eagle Popcorn Bucket for America 250
icymi.body: A Sam Eagle popcorn bucket and red-white-and-blue snacks arrive at Disneyland later this month as part of the United States Semiquincentennial celebration. The Muppets character's patriotic theme anchors the limited-time treat lineup.

spotlight.title: Disney World Golf Guide Highlights Championship Courses and Mini Golf
spotlight.body: A new Disney Parks Blog feature breaks down golfing options across Walt Disney World, from 18-hole championship courses to Fantasia Gardens and Winter Summerland mini golf. The guide targets guests looking to mix theme park days with tee times.

parkioInsight.text: Early morning tee times at Disney golf courses typically offer cooler temperatures and faster play. Booking at least a week ahead often secures preferred slots, especially during peak travel windows.

videos.summary: A dining review tests whether The Plaza Restaurant at Magic Kingdom deserves its reputation as the park's lowest-rated table-service spot.
